rationale: No conflict. Fam. Code §71.003 defines 'family' for family-code proceedings by relationship status. It does not reference homestead exemption amounts or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: "Family" includes individuals related by consanguinity or affinity, as determined under Sections 573.022 and 573.024, Government Code, individuals who are former spouses of each other, individuals who are the parents of the same child, without regard to marriage, and a foster child and foster parent, without regard to whether those individuals reside together.
_note: Rule is a definitional provision in family law; no nexus to property-tax homestead exemption amounts.
